title: Relax, pay maintenance, be happy: Supreme Court to 54-year-old man seeking divorce from estranged wife
description: The Supreme Court on Friday refused to grant divorce to a 54-year-old man paying ₹15,000 per month in maintenance to his estranged wife for the past 16 years.A Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta asked the man to come up with a reasonable offer for permanent alimony if he wanted the Court to consider his plea for divorce. When the man said that even ₹15,000 maintenance is a lot for him to afford as he earns ₹65,000 per month, the Court said, “₹15,000 is hardly anything these days...I
